Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Okmain: How to pick an OK main colour of an image 186 upvotes, 41 comments
  2. Can I run AI locally? 315 upvotes, 78 comments
  3. The Mrs Fractal: Mirror, Rotate, Scale (2025) 29 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. The Wyden Siren Goes Off Again: We'll Be "Stunned" by NSA Under Section 702 126 upvotes, 30 comments
  5. Gvisor on Raspbian 48 upvotes, 9 comments
  6. Lost Doctor Who Episodes Found 113 upvotes, 30 comments
  7. Willingness to look stupid 669 upvotes, 228 comments
  8. “This is not the computer for you” 876 upvotes, 327 comments
  9. Executing programs inside transformers with exponentially faster inference 259 upvotes, 96 comments
  10. Meta Platforms: Lobbying, dark money, and the App Store Accountability Act 1043 upvotes, 454 comments
  11. Dijkstra's Crisis: The End of Algol and Beginning of Software Engineering (2010) [pdf] 52 upvotes, 16 comments
  12. Launch HN: Captain (YC W26) – Automated RAG for Files 31 upvotes, 9 comments
  13. Run NanoClaw in Docker Sandboxes 114 upvotes, 50 comments
  14. Bucketsquatting is (finally) dead 271 upvotes, 141 comments
  15. E2E encrypted messaging on Instagram will no longer be supported after 8 May 275 upvotes, 149 comments
  16. Show HN: What was the world listening to? Music charts, 20 countries (1940–2025) 84 upvotes, 38 comments
  17. TUI Studio – visual terminal UI design tool 415 upvotes, 235 comments
  18. The Bovadium Fragments: Together with The Origin of Bovadium 36 upvotes, 15 comments
  19. Show HN: Channel Surfer – Watch YouTube like it’s cable TV 109 upvotes, 61 comments
  20. NASA targets Artemis II crewed moon mission for April 1 launch 51 upvotes, 28 comments
  21. Revealed: Face of 75,000-year-old female Neanderthal from cave 23 upvotes, 10 comments
  22. Show HN: Context Gateway – Compress agent context before it hits the LLM 9 upvotes, 2 comments
  23. Show HN: Svglib a SVG parser and renderer for Windows 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  24. The Accidental Room (2018) 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Why the militaries are scrambling to create their own Starlink 28 upvotes, 15 comments
  26. Your Phone Is an Entire Computer 23 upvotes, 13 comments
  27. Launch HN: Spine Swarm (YC S23) – AI agents that collaborate on a visual canvas 64 upvotes, 54 comments
  28. Removing recursion via explicit callstack simulation 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. Qatar helium shutdown puts chip supply chain on a two-week clock 98 upvotes, 104 comments
  30. Parallels confirms MacBook Neo can run Windows in a virtual machine 39 upvotes, 63 comments

Last generated 2:30am, 14 March 2026. Source here.
